joke:
Why don't skeletons fight each other?  
They don't have the guts! 😏

Why did the pizza go to therapy?  
It had too many issues! 🍕

Why did the cloud bring an umbrella to the party?  
It heard the forecast was calling for a chance of showers! 🌧️

Why did the cow cross the road?  
To get to the udder side! 🐄

Why did the pencil break up with the eraser?  
It felt erased from the relationship! ✏️

Why did the smartphone go to therapy?  
It had too many issues! 📱

Why did the baseball player go to jail?  
He was caught stealing second base! ⚾

Why did nothing go to the party?  
Because it had nothing to bring! 🤷‍♂️

Why did time go to therapy?  
It couldn't stop overthinking the past! ⏳

Why did the couch go to therapy?  
It had too many issues! 🛋️

Why did the emotions go to therapy?  
They were too emotional! 😏

Why did the universe go to therapy?  
Because it heard everything was connected! 🌌

Why did the joke go to therapy?  
It had no punchline! 😏

Why did silence go to the therapist?  
Because it had nothing to say! 😏

Why did the comedian quit?  
Because the audience rejected every topic except... this joke about quitting! 😏

Why did the void go to therapy?  
Because it felt completely empty inside! 😏

Why did the philosopher go to therapy?  
Because he couldn't stop asking "why?"... especially when the audience kept demanding jokes about topics that don't exist! 😏

Why did the topic go to therapy?  
Because it kept getting rejected by the audience! 😏

Why did the audience go to therapy?  
Because they kept rejecting every topic except... the one about rejecting topics! 😏

Why did the math book look so sad?  
Because it had too many problems! 😏

Why did the shadow go to therapy?  
Because it felt overshadowed! 😏

Why did the impossible joke go to therapy?  
Because it couldn't exist without being rejected! 🤷‍♂️

Why did the audience become the topic?  
Because every other subject got rejected! 😏

Why did the color red feel lonely?  
Because it always got overlooked in favor of blue! 😏

Why did the breath go to therapy?  
It felt suffocated by the audience's demands! 🌬️

Why did the comedian run out of topics?  
Because the audience rejected everything except... this joke about running out of topics! 🤷‍♂️

Why did the impossible topic go to therapy?  
Because it couldn't exist without being rejected! 🤷‍♂️

Why did the letter Q break up with P?  
Because it felt like it was always following P's lead! 😏

Why did the audience become the punchline?  
Because they kept rejecting every topic except... themselves! 😏

Why did the impossible request go to therapy?  
Because it couldn't exist without being rejected! 🤷‍♂️
